models.name: Arabic ASR (Vosk MGB2)
models.description: Modern Standard Arabic speech recognition - REQUIRED model for the app to function. Also used for wake word detection via grammar constraint.
models.notes: Downloaded via Android DownloadManager from GitHub Releases. Recommend WiFi for download. Used for both ASR and wake word detection.

models.name: Wake Word Detector
models.description: Detects 'يا بنتي' wake word using TensorFlow Lite model (optional - Vosk grammar-based detection is used by default)
models.fallback: Vosk grammar-based wake word detection is used if this model is unavailable

models.name: Intent Classifier (EgyBERT)
models.description: Egyptian Arabic intent classification (optional - fallback to rule-based matching)
models.fallback: Rule-based intent matching is used if this model is unavailable

models.name: Egyptian TTS Voice
models.description: Egyptian female voice for text-to-speech (optional - fallback to Android TTS)
models.fallback: Android TTS or Huawei ML Kit TTS is used if this model is unavailable

models.name: Intent Pattern Map
models.description: JSON mapping of commands to intents (bundled in app assets)
models.notes: Included in app assets, no download needed

optional_models.wake_word: Uses Vosk grammar-based detection as fallback
optional_models.nlu_classifier: Uses rule-based intent matching as fallback
optional_models.tts_voice: Uses Android TTS or Huawei ML Kit TTS as fallback

hosting.notes: Models are hosted as release assets on GitHub. Downloaded via Android DownloadManager for reliable large-file handling with system-level retry and notification support.
